positive: A mystical, stylized forest creature silhouette, resembling a mix of fox and celestial deer, standing amidst bioluminescent fantasy foliage. The creature has flowing, ornate antlers and fur that subtly catch the light. The scene should feature strong, high-contrast colors: deep indigo and emerald green against pops of glowing teal and gold. Use a vector-art aesthetic with crisp lines and minimal shading, making it perfect for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, symmetry, dramatic forest setting, magical realism, highly detailed illustration.
negative: blur, artifact, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, deformed, messy, messy lines, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, low detail
